issue_body:
Vagrant is unable to detect the openwrt ARM virtual machine as linux. 

### Vagrant version

Vagrant Version:   Vagrant 2.2.9

### Host operating system

Distributor ID:	Ubuntu
Description:	Ubuntu 20.04.1 LTS
Release:	20.04
Codename:	focal

### Guest operating system
Vagrant-openwrt box: vladimir-babichev/openwrt-19.07.3
https://github.com/vladimir-babichev/vagrant-openwrt-box

### Vagrantfile

```ruby
Vagrant.configure("2") do |config|
  # Use OpenWRT 19.07.3 Vagrant box 
  config.vm.box = "vladimir-babichev/openwrt-19.07.3"
  config.vm.hostname = "openwrt"
end
```

### Debug output

$ vagrant halt
==> default: Attempting graceful shutdown of VM...
    default: 
    default: Vagrant insecure key detected. Vagrant will automatically replace
    default: this with a newly generated keypair for better security.
The guest operating system of the machine could not be detected!
Vagrant requires this knowledge to perform specific tasks such
as mounting shared folders and configuring networks. Please add
the ability to detect this guest operating system to Vagrant
by creating a plugin or reporting a bug.

### Expected behavior

Vagrant produces the error on startup, provision and hat. 

### Actual behavior

What actually happened?

### Steps to reproduce

1. Create the a minimal vagrantfile with box vladimir-babichev/openwrt-19.07.3
2. Do 'vargant up'
3. Do 'vargrant halt'

### References
https://github.com/vladimir-babichev/vagrant-openwrt-box/issues/2
pr_body:
This commit includes the following capabilities for OpenWrt:

- Guest detection
- SSH key replacement
- Change host name
- Synced folder support with rsync

Interesting things about OpenWrt:

- root login
- Default shell is ash
- Uses Busybox binaries
- Package manager is `opkg`

PR can be tested with the `vladimir-babichev/openwrt-19.07.3` box. Closes #11790.
